value.rationale: This offering describes prompt context enrichment features for an agent — specifically workspace file path autocomplete and visual media inputs to the agent prompt. These are input/context features that support the agentic coding workflow (Google's Antigravity/agentic coding product), covering only a slice of that capability (prompt context inputs rather than the full coding agent). It is a partial feature of the agentic-coding capability, likely a sub-feature of Google's agentic coding product.
